steps.title: Heat the mass, not the air

beats.title: A whole plain system
items: Mass heater — a day of warmth, one fire
Sun wall — free heat from the south
A tight, sealed house holding it all

beats.title: The honest limits
items: Stone is slow — warms over hours, not minutes
A rhythm of the day, not a thermostat
A masonry heater is real money & labor
But you owe no one, depend on nothing

beats.title: Outside wall · smolder · leaky house
beats.desc: All three come from one wrong idea — that you heat the air right now. You don't. You charge the stone and hold its heat.
